title: Enchiridion 8: Desire Nothing That Is Not In Your Power
description: Do not seek to have events happen as you want them to. Wish them to happen as they do happen, and you will go on well.
introduction: Do not seek to have events happen as you want them to. Wish them to happen as they do happen, and you will go on well.

translation.text: Do not seek to have events happen as you wish, but wish them to happen as they do happen, and your life will go smoothly.
